title: Add Windows-only Cargo deps (windows + enigo)

context.goal: Add target-cfg dependencies so they only compile on Windows builds, keeping Linux footprint identical.

steps: Append the cargo_toml_block above the [profile.release] section in src-tauri/Cargo.toml
Run `cargo check` on Linux to confirm no resolution conflict (deps will not be downloaded for non-windows targets)
If cross toolchain available, run `cargo check --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc` to confirm crates resolve
acceptance: Linux `cargo check` exit 0, no new deps in Cargo.lock for linux platform compile
Cargo.lock updated with windows + enigo entries (will populate on first windows build)
